title: TRQP Assurance Hub — Candidate Control Catalog
description: A minimal candidate control catalog used by examples and validation tooling. Controls are stable identifiers with audit-oriented objectives.

controls.name: Governance policy published
controls.objective: The operator MUST publish a governance policy describing scope, roles, decision rights, and escalation paths.

controls.name: Evidence bundle + manifest provided
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide an evidence bundle with a manifest that enumerates artifacts and their integrity bindings.

controls.name: Lifecycle assertions recorded
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide lifecycle assertions covering issuance, updates, and deprecation/retirement for in-scope artifacts.

controls.name: Remediation closure evidenced
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide remediation closure evidence for identified non-conformities within the declared scope.

controls.name: Continuous monitoring evidence
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide operational monitoring evidence demonstrating ongoing control performance (e.g., telemetry, alerts, and review cadence).

controls.name: Incident metrics exported
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide an incident metrics export covering the defined reporting window (e.g., counts, severity, time-to-detect, time-to-recover).

controls.name: Change log maintained
controls.objective: The operator MUST maintain a change log for in-scope components and artifacts, including approvals and effective dates.

controls.name: Key rotation proof recorded
controls.objective: The operator MUST provide evidence of key rotation and key lifecycle discipline for signing/verification material.
